name: add_to_cart
description: Add an item to the customer's cart. Call this every time the customer agrees to add something. The menu_item_id MUST come from the menu data in the system prompt - never invent IDs.

conversation_id.description: The ElevenLabs conversation ID. Use the system-injected {{conversation_id}} variable.

menu_item_id.description: The numeric ID from the menu (e.g., 1101001 for Original Single)

modifiers.description: Optional modifications. For burgers, may include 'bun' (one of 'Martin's Potato Bun', 'Original Bun', 'Normal'). May include 'add_ons' (array of Extra Dip item IDs).
